narrative:
Fairview Park-03-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,223 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.8 percentage points.
